slo_context.purpose: Define health expectations for the Sigma DataTech Bronze-to-Silver pipeline.

data_freshness_slo.reasoning: Daily financial dashboards need data refreshed before the next business day.
data_freshness_slo.breach_impact: Stale transaction data would cause merchant reports and financial KPIs to be inaccurate.

quality_threshold_slo.reasoning: At least 95% of Silver records should pass quality checks to maintain trusted analytics.
quality_threshold_slo.breach_impact: Low data quality would erode confidence in downstream dashboards and reporting.

row_count_slo.reasoning: The dataset processes about 21 rows per day, so this buffer covers normal variation.
row_count_slo.breach_impact: Unexpected row counts may indicate missing data, duplicates, or pipeline failure.

pipeline_runtime_slo.reasoning: A daily batch pipeline should complete quickly enough to deliver timely reporting.
pipeline_runtime_slo.breach_impact: Slow pipeline execution delays analytics delivery and masks upstream failures.
